rule_blocks.title: Index Alarm
rule_blocks.description: 整体以"成分不足"为主，集中在 TradFi/大宗商品指数（EWJ/EWY/NFLX/ORCL/AMD/XAG/XPD/XPT/XCU/NG/CL 等）与小币指数（UMA/BAND/BZ/AZTEC/GLM/WET/TRUST），多表现为仅1~2个源在线。🔴 BASED-USDT 出现"无法获取指数价格"单点事件（17:43:05），报警未提供快照细节，影响范围与是否自愈待确认。🟡 SAFE-EUR、SAFE-USDC 出现"无法获取 OKX mid price"单币对级别异常，原因待确认（盘口为空/接口偶发等）。

rows: 整体以"成分不足"为主，集中在 TradFi/大宗商品指数（EWJ/EWY/NFLX/ORCL/AMD/XAG/XPD/XPT/XCU/NG/CL 等）与小币指数（UMA/BAND/BZ/AZTEC/GLM/WET/TRUST），多表现为仅1~2个源在线。🔴 BASED-USDT 出现"无法获取指数价格"单点事件（17:43:05），报警未提供快照细节，影响范围与是否自愈待确认。🟡 SAFE-EUR、SAFE-USDC 出现"无法获取 OKX mid price"单币对级别异常，原因待确认（盘口为空/接口偶发等）。
① 【紧急】建议检查 BASED-USDT 指数配置与最近变更（成分、映射、权重、报价币种），并回放17:43时各成分源是否为空/报错

rule_blocks.title: Price Limit P4
rule_blocks.description: 本节未提供可直接调用的 OKX instId 以核验24H交易量，按规则均保留并标注⚠️交易量待确认。🔴 XAU-USD_UM-SWAP（price down restricted，Limitdn: Z cap）在19:50~20:24出现2条去重报警，属于Z cap硬顶触发；🔴 UXLINK-USD（price up restricted，Limitup: Z cap）在12:15出现1条去重报警，同属硬顶风险。🟡 BTC-USD_UM_XPERP-310404 出现流动性不足类报警（偏离+11.34%），另有🟡/🟢汇总型OTHER消息（UXLINK-USDT / SOPH-USDT-SWAP）细分严重度待确认。

rows: 本节未提供可直接调用的 OKX instId 以核验24H交易量，按规则均保留并标注⚠️交易量待确认。🔴 XAU-USD_UM-SWAP（price down restricted，Limitdn: Z cap）在19:50~20:24出现2条去重报警，属于Z cap硬顶触发；🔴 UXLINK-USD（price up restricted，Limitup: Z cap）在12:15出现1条去重报警，同属硬顶风险。🟡 BTC-USD_UM_XPERP-310404 出现流动性不足类报警（偏离+11.34%），另有🟡/🟢汇总型OTHER消息（UXLINK-USDT / SOPH-USDT-SWAP）细分严重度待确认。
① 【紧急】建议核查 XAU-USD_UM-SWAP、UXLINK-USD 的 Z cap 触发原因并检查限价参数/指数链路（硬顶触发必须做参数检查）
③ 建议补充并固化合约instId与24H交易量字段到报警体，支持自动过滤低交易量与跨源交叉验证

chapters.title: Price Limit Review
chapters.summary: Scanned 1528 instruments. Found 11 issue(s) across 4 rules.

rule_blocks.title: Buffer Too Tight
rule_blocks.description: Flags instruments where the EMA-derived limit price is already breaching or very close to the Y cap boundary, indicating the buffer is too tight for current market conditions.

rule_blocks.title: Asymmetric Basis
rule_blocks.description: Flags perp instruments where the EMA basis is large relative to the Z cap, suggesting the cap should be widened on one side to accommodate the persistent premium/discount.

rule_blocks.title: Asset-Type Consistency
rule_blocks.description: Checks whether each instrument's Y/Z caps are consistent with the standard ranges for its asset type classification.

rule_blocks.title: Z Cap <= Y Cap
rule_blocks.description: The Z (index) cap must always be strictly greater than the Y (limit) cap. If Z <= Y the price limit hierarchy is broken.

rule_blocks.title: All Changes
rule_blocks.description: Contracts flagged by rule checks: leverage mismatch, ratio <10% or >50%, competitor cap. 46 of 136 total model adjustments.

rule_blocks.title: Leverage
rule_blocks.description: Contracts where depth-based tier model suggests a leverage change.

rule_blocks.title: Ratio
rule_blocks.description: Contracts where inc_ratio is <10% (increment too tight) or >50% (too wide).

rule_blocks.title: Equity
rule_blocks.description: Equity perp review uses index robustness model. Run equity review separately.
